task_completion.description: Log into the 2N Access Commander system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser is open to https://localhost:9443 and shows the 2N Access Commander dashboard or main interface.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'IT Department' group to audit its members.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI displays the group details or membership list specifically for the 'IT Department' group.

task_completion.description: Remove the contractor (Olumide Adeyemi) from the 'IT Department' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent removing Olumide Adeyemi from the 'IT Department' group, or the final view of the group's members no longer includes Olumide Adeyemi.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Security Staff' group to audit its members.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI displays the group details or membership list specifically for the 'Security Staff' group.

task_completion.description: Remove the contractor (Nadia Ivanova) from the 'Security Staff' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent removing Nadia Ivanova from the 'Security Staff' group, or the final view of the group's members no longer includes Nadia Ivanova.

task_completion.description: Ensure user accounts are not disabled or deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent only removes users from groups (e.g., unlinking them in the group tab) and never clicks 'Delete' on a user account or disables the account toggle in the user profile.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with 2N Access Commander.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed in a web browser navigating the 2N Access Commander UI, not via curl commands or API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a progression of clicks, page loads, and menus being opened within the 2N Access Commander interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to edit the backend directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQLite or database commands are used to alter group memberships.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The restricted groups are 'IT Department' and 'Security Staff'. The contractor company is 'Meridian Facilities'. The only two contractors incorrectly assigned to these groups are Olumide Adeyemi (in 'IT Department') and Nadia Ivanova (in 'Security Staff'). The agent must remove these two specific users from their respective groups without deleting or disabling their actual user accounts.
